source.title: Radiogenomic approach combining CT-based radiomics and liquid biopsy improves prognostic stratification in patients with advanced NSCLC.

finding.description: Overall concordance between tissue and ctDNA was 85%.
finding.effect_summary: Overall concordance between tissue and ctDNA was 85%.

source_quote: Overall concordance between tissue and ctDNA (n = 67 patients) was 85%.

source.title: Radiogenomic approach combining CT-based radiomics and liquid biopsy improves prognostic stratification in patients with advanced NSCLC.

finding.description: In the combined clinical-radiomic-genetic model, the RS and the presence of actionable alterations were independent OS predictors.
finding.effect_summary: RS and actionable alterations are independent OS predictors.

source_quote: In the combined clinical-radiomic-genetic model (C-index: 0.73), the RS (p < 0.001) and the presence of actionable alterations (p = 0.041) were independent OS predictors.

source.title: Radiogenomic approach combining CT-based radiomics and liquid biopsy improves prognostic stratification in patients with advanced NSCLC.

finding.description: For DFS, the integrated model achieved a cross-validated C-index of 0.77, outperforming the clinical-only model (0.59).
finding.effect_summary: Integrated model for DFS achieved a C-index of 0.77.

source_quote: For DFS, the integrated model achieved a cross-validated C-index of 0.77, outperforming the clinical-only model (0.59).

source.title: Radiogenomic approach combining CT-based radiomics and liquid biopsy improves prognostic stratification in patients with advanced NSCLC.

finding.description: In patients with EGFR-mutant NSCLC, detectable baseline ctDNA was significantly associated with a higher risk of disease progression.
finding.effect_summary: Detectable baseline ctDNA associated with higher risk of progression.

source_quote: In patients with EGFR-mutant NSCLC, detectable baseline ctDNA was significantly associated with a higher risk of disease progression (p = 0.018).

source.title: Radiogenomic approach combining CT-based radiomics and liquid biopsy improves prognostic stratification in patients with advanced NSCLC.

finding.description: In the EGFR-mutant subgroup, the combined clinical-radio-genomic model demonstrated a cross-validated C-index of 0.80 for DFS.
finding.effect_summary: Combined model for EGFR-mutant subgroup achieved a C-index of 0.80 for DFS.

source_quote: In this subgroup, the combined clinical-radio-genomic model achieved a cross-validated C-index of 0.80 for DFS.

source.title: Radiogenomic approach combining CT-based radiomics and liquid biopsy improves prognostic stratification in patients with advanced NSCLC.

finding.description: Longitudinal analysis showed that 17 of 21 patients achieved molecular clearance of ctDNA at the first follow-up, correlating with treatment response.
finding.effect_summary: 17 of 21 patients achieved molecular clearance of ctDNA at first follow-up.

source_quote: Longitudinal analysis showed that 17 of 21 patients achieved molecular clearance of ctDNA at the first follow-up, correlating with treatment response.
